narrative: PRL stabilized after yesterday's crash: volume-weighted price drifted -1.65% to $0.607 on just $32.4k of cross-venue volume — turnover halved as the move bled out. The bridge kept absorbing flow: custody +11,381 PRL to 556,659 and minted WPRL +14,745 to 551,970, with mint settlement actually outpacing deposits and tightening surplus 1.50% → 0.85% as the relay worked through yesterday's backlog. Network hashrate recovered +30.6% to 32.85 EH/s on a +2 GPU MinePRL footprint (21 → 23), with block cadence steady at ~151s. Code velocity continued to taper as the rolling 7-day window sheds RC5.33–RC5.36 (8 commits combined), while pearl-research-labs/pearl quietly added +3 stars to 203 — fourth straight day of star inflow.

market.prl_circulating_supply_method: block_height × current_block_reward (constant-subsidy approximation — Pearl is in month 1, before the first halving)
sources: pool.mineprl.com/v1/public/summary (network.height, network.block_reward_prl for circulating supply approximation)

network.active_workers_scope: MinePRL pool only — network-wide miner count is not exposed by Pearl RPC

anomalies: Volume halved ($65.5k → $32.4k) as the post-crash dust settled — main WPRL/USDT v3 pool carried 99% of the day's turnover.
Bridge mints outpaced deposits in 24h (+14,745 WPRL vs +11,381 PRL custody) — first day the relay cleared backlog faster than new flow arrived; surplus tightened 1.50% → 0.85%.
Network hashrate +30.6% to 32.85 EH/s recovered most of yesterday's -29% post-ATH retracement; non-pool capacity remains the swing factor (MinePRL only +2 GPUs).

social.summary: No coordinated chatter visible on @prlnet or @pearlbridgexyz despite back-to-back -18% and -1.6% sessions and the 550k WPRL milestone. Steady GitHub attention on pearl-research-labs/pearl (+3 stars to 203, fourth consecutive day of inflow) remains the only concrete attention signal.

github.last_commit_msg: ux(RC5.36): hide slow-lane explainer when fast-lane has plenty of room
docs: tidy mirror references and audit attributions
fix(rpc): use chain.IsCurrent for getblocktemplate IBD check (#125)
